description_long: This is a modern, rectangular nightstand or small cabinet with a dark wood finish and a single, wide drawer at the bottom. The front features a recessed open shelf above the drawer, providing additional storage space. The drawer face is lighter in color, contrasting with the rest of the cabinet, and appears to be made of a different material or finish. The sides and top are smooth and flat, with no visible handles or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist design. The back panel is plain and unadorned, likely designed to be placed against a wall. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and suitable for use in bedrooms, living rooms, or urban interiors.
description: A dark wood-finished cabinet with a single light-colored drawer and an open shelf above, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf and the extended light-colored drawer.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth, dark wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, flat back panel with a lighter finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a smooth, dark wood surface.
